summary.lv: Vecākais aplikāciju speciālists, kas uztur Workday konfigurāciju, drošību un integrācijas finanšu moduļos (AP/AR/GL/iepirkumi) Intrum Group IT funkcijā. Risina incidentus, veido atskaites un atbalsta tenant administrēšanu ITIL/Agile vidē.
summary.en: Senior Application Specialist supporting Workday configuration, security and integrations across Finance modules (AP/AR/GL/Procurement) in Intrum's Group IT function. Resolves incidents, builds reports and supports tenant administration in an ITIL/Agile environment.
